name: X-Golf Minot
about: X-Golf Minot is an indoor golf simulator venue that provides access to 6 state-of-the-art simulators. The facility caters to golfers for both recreation and serious practice, offering a full bar, food service, and event hosting capabilities. Operating hours are Sunday through Thursday from 10 AM to 10 PM, and Friday to Saturday from 10 AM to 11 PM. Pricing is structured on a per-bay, hourly basis, with rates varying by day and time of day.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera systems and impact sensors
Ability to play world-famous golf courses year-round, regardless of weather
Convenient on-site food, beverage, and event space for a complete entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with 'tasty bites' and a specific menu available upon contact
Full bar available, including craft cocktails and beer

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rental is available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own full bar and kitchen. You cannot bring outside food or beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. With more players, an additional hour is recommended for each person added to the group to maintain pace.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Minot.
